hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional Black male American handyman in clean work uniform mounting a TV in a modern residential living room, photorealistic, no text or logos. Toolbelt visible. Customer-facing stance.
hero.caption_context: If photo is of Wheatley, caption names him. Otherwise reference 'same hand on every job' / '1-hour window' / 'owner-answered' positioning.

gallery.context: TV mounted cleanly on living room wall — the #1 stated service. Caption 'TV mounting — same day'.
Door installation or replacement with clean finish. Caption 'Door replacement — measured, hung, trimmed'.
Ceiling fan or light fixture install. Caption 'Ceiling fans + lighting — safe, tested, clean'.
Furniture or fitness equipment assembled. Caption 'Furniture + fitness — assembled and placed'.
Carpentry work — trim, cabinets, shelving. Caption 'Carpentry — fix what's broken, build what isn't there'.
Wheatley with tools/toolbelt, organized van, or clean workspace. Caption 'The clean-and-gone standard'.

sections.context: Sandy Springs or North Atlanta residential; Unsplash OK

notes: Handyman vertical = hero should show action or clean completed work. Wheatley is the face of the business — prefer photos with him over generic tool shots. The 1-hour arrival window differentiator doesn't have a natural photo expression; rely on copy for that. The 60-day guarantee likewise. Photos should reinforce 'clean and professional' brand descriptor from own-site copy.
